title: metrosideros polymorpha var. tremuloides
intro: Metrosideros polymorpha var. tremuloides, also known as the 'Hawaiian liliko'i', is a variety of the Metrosideros polymorpha plant, which is a flowering tree native to Hawaii. This plant has been used in traditional Hawaiian medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Metrosideros polymorpha var. tremuloides include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and providing antioxidant protection. The plant is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or topical ointment, and is also used in traditional Hawaiian medicine to make a medicinal oil that can be used to treat various health issues.
